origin.en: Bắc Hà District, Lào Cai Province, northern Vietnam
origin.zh: Bắc Hà District, Lào Cai Province, northern Vietnam

history.en: Indigenous spitz-type breed developed by ethnic minority groups, particularly the Hmong people, in the mountainous Bắc Hà region of northern Vietnam. Traditionally used for hunting, guarding, and companionship. Officially recognized by the Vietnam Kennel Association in 2019.
history.zh: Indigenous spitz-type breed developed by ethnic minority groups, particularly the Hmong people, in the mountainous Bắc Hà region of northern Vietnam. Traditionally used for hunting, guarding, and companionship. Officially recognized by the Vietnam Kennel Association in 2019.
